sources.title: Souad 2021 Clip In Cinemas From 27 August 2021 BFI
sources.description: Souad 2021 Clip In Cinemas From 27 August 2021 BFI Synopsis Egyptian Souad, 19, has several identities: one on social media, others as a diligent student and an obedient daughter. When Souad’s ideas of a self-determined life are shattered, her younger sister sets out to look for answers. Ayten Amin’s SOUAD in UK & Ireland cinemas on 27 August 2021

metadata.Plot: Souad, a 19-year-old young woman, leads a double life. While remaining conservative and veiled among her family and society, Souad is obsessed with her image on social media and goes into several secret virtual relationships with men. She constantly lies about her personal life, projecting wishful images of a different desired life. Her ambitions are slowly crushed by the invasion of her true reality. A series of small incidents lead to a tragic event, that makes Rabab, her 13-year-old little sister, embarks on a real-life journey looking for answers.
metadata.Actors: Bassant Ahmed, Basmala Elghaiesh, Hussein Ghanem
